title: podman machine os upgrade broken on 6
body:
trying the new command on 6.0 fails with
```
$ bin/podman machine os upgrade 
Error: unsupported OS
Error: exit status 125
```

The main problem is that we changed podman-machine-os to report its own variant and the code here was not updated. Because we do not yet have upgrade tests this was not caught.

comments.body: do you have a link to the PR that changed the variant?
